title: HuBMAP - STANFORD RTI Multiplex Ion Beam Imaging (MIBI) MODALITY OVERVIEW
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5cllk","text":"We aim to provide high resolution, high dimensional images of human placenta in early pregnancy by using our multiplexed ion beam imaging methodology for building an atlas of human organs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
